atomic_facts.fact: A man in a light blue shirt is speaking in a kitchen setting.
A semi-transparent overlay of desserts and a product box is visible over the man.
The text 'TheBalancingAct.com' is displayed in a banner at the bottom of the screen.
A logo with the letters 'TBA' inside a pink speech bubble is visible on the lower left.
A box with the text 'Key Lime' is visible in the overlay.
